name: Ezo Pmp → Clear Total Volume Dosed
description: Clear the values of the [Current Volume Dosed](https://esphome.io/components/ezo_pmp#ezo_pmp-current_volume_dosed_sensor), [Total Volume Dosed](https://esphome.io/components/ezo_pmp#ezo_pmp-total_volume_dosed_sensor) and [Absolute Total Volume Dosed](https://esphome.io/components/ezo_pmp#ezo_pmp-absolute_total_volume_dosed_sensor) sensors.
